rootCause: Registry file was correct on disk with y_field=student_count y_label=Student Count and semantic_roles.y=count_metric, but the running backend process still served stale in-memory metadata with y_label=% of Students and ratio_metric.
fixApplied: Kept y_field=student_count; kept y_label=Student Count and semantic_roles.y=count_metric; updated TaskRegistryService to reload taskRegistry.json when file mtime changes; restarted backend runtime and confirmed API now returns Student Count.
method: Label/runtime metadata correction only, matching served metadata to current data mapping without changing chart semantics.
beforeBehavior: Browser showed % of Students because runtime API was serving stale metadata even though the registry file had been corrected.
afterBehavior: Stacked bar is expected to keep count mapping and show Student Count as the value axis title; API now returns Student Count.
notes: Did not switch to pct_within_group; no SQL chart type or adapter change; automated test/build passed and API metadata check passed; browser screenshot confirmation still required before marking pass.
